tasks.name: Offboarding — Dropdown UI (SelectField) Across Resignation Flow
tasks.body: Replaced native/raw dropdowns with the shared SelectField across resignation/offboarding and added an inline-dropdown mode
tasks.summary:
- Replaced the raw HTML <select> status filter on the Offboarding listing with the shared SelectField UI
- Added a useDropdown prop to SelectField so it renders an inline positioned dropdown on web instead of the bottom-sheet drawer
- Set searchable=false on the short status/reason dropdowns (removed the internal search box); kept search only in the employee picker
- Employee picker now shows Name + 'ID · Role' (pulled from the user's roles)
- Type-checked clean across all edited files

tasks.name: Offboarding — Branch, Commit, Push & History Cleanup
tasks.body: Branched from dev, committed and pushed the dropdown work; extracted an accidental msalConfig change and force-pushed a clean commit
tasks.summary:
- Created branch fix/offboarding-dropdown-ui from origin/dev (verified offboarding files matched dev)
- Committed and pushed the dropdown UI changes to Bitbucket
- Detected an unrelated msalConfig.web.ts change swept in by git add -A
- Pulled it out of the commit, stashed it, and force-pushed the cleaned commit (offboarding files only)

tasks.name: Offboarding — TL/PL Resignation Manager Visibility Review
tasks.body: Traced the backend visibility logic to confirm a Team Lead / Project Lead resignation surfaces to their reporting manager
tasks.summary:
- Traced findByFiltersScoped + ELEVATED_ROLES in the resignation service/repository
- Confirmed TEAM_LEAD/PROJECT_LEAD are excluded from ELEVATED_ROLES, so their resignations show to the reporting manager
- Confirmed visibility is computed at read-time (no snapshot) so already-submitted resignations surface automatically
- Confirmed the logic is already on origin/dev; noted managers see it in the list but are not push-notified (HR/Admin only)

tasks.name: Local DB — Remove Designation for User
tasks.body: Cleared job_title (designation) for a user in the local stage database
tasks.summary:
- Located the job_title column on the users table in monarch-portal-stage
- Verified the existing value before changing it
- Set job_title = NULL for the target user and confirmed the update

tasks.name: My Resignation — Loading Issue Diagnosis
tasks.body: Diagnosed the My Resignation page stuck on the loader as a backend request hang, not a frontend bug
tasks.summary:
- Identified the full-page loader is gated on useGetMyExitQuery (GET my exit)
- Confirmed from the Network panel that all API requests were pending (backend hang, one 200 after 20s)
- Tied it to the Spring async/SSE filter-chain stack trace (dropped notification/ws streams saturating threads)
- Recommended a backend restart + hard reload; confirmed the frontend changes were unrelated
